query: SELECT at.id, at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo, at.status, ai.currentStageId, ai.status as instanceStatus, u.name FROM approvalTasks at JOIN approvalInstances ai ON at.instanceId = ai.id LEFT JOIN users u ON at.assignedTo = u.id WHERE at.status = 'pending' ORDER BY at.instanceId, at.stageId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT at.id, at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo, at.status, ai.currentStageId, ai.status as instanceStatus, u.name FROM approvalTasks at JOIN approvalInstances ai ON at.instanceId = ai.id LEFT JOIN users u ON at.assignedTo = u.id WHERE at.status = 'pending' ORDER BY at.instanceId, at.stageId;
